Localization.Description: A client terminated an SSH connection before authentication was complete

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}:{src.port} terminated an SSH connection to host {event_src.host} before authentication was complete
The unknown user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}:{src.port} terminated an SSH connection to host {event_src.host} before authentication was complete
A client from host {src.host}:{src.port} terminated an SSH connection to host {event_src.host} before user authentication was complete
